name: Electric Lighting Systems
tagline: Controlled conversion of electricity into visible radiation — from carbon arcs to solid-state diodes
problem:
Fire and gaslight stain ceilings, demand ventilation, and start urban fires. Electric lighting promises instant ignition, directional beams, and — once grids stabilised — pricing per lumen that scales with industry rather than whale oil.

Early technologies fought efficiency and lifetime: resistive bulbs trade much power as heat; arcs roar and sputter; discharge tubes need ballasts. The systems problem includes fixtures, grounding, circuit protection, and voltage drop on long feeders — lighting design is secretly distribution engineering.

Spectral quality matters for factories, surgery, and circadian health — metrics moved from candlepower to lumens, colour temperature, and colour rendering index.
overview:
Incandescent lamps pass current through a refractory filament in inert gas or vacuum, heating to incandescence. Tungsten replaced carbon for melting point and efficacy. Halogen cycles redeposit evaporated tungsten, extending life in compact envelopes.

Fluorescent and HID sources excite gas discharges; phosphors down-convert UV to white. Ballasts limit current — historically inductors, today electronic high-frequency inverters. LEDs use semiconductor junctions emitting narrow bands combined with phosphors for white; drivers regulate current tightly because diode light output tracks current while voltage is sharp-kneed.

Dimming historically chopped voltage; LEDs need compatible dimmers that understand PWM or trailing-edge waveforms to avoid flicker and colour shift.

Street and stadium lighting added photocells, time clocks, and now mesh controls — cybersecurity joins the stack as lights become IoT nodes.

principles.name: Wien displacement
principles.explanation: Blackbody spectrum peak shifts with temperature — higher filament temperature yields whiter light but accelerates evaporation.

principles.name: Luminous efficacy
principles.explanation: Lumens per watt weights human eye sensitivity — UV and IR watts do not count equally.

principles.name: Power factor in ballasts
principles.explanation: Inductive ballasts draw reactive power; capacitors correct; electronic ballasts can approach unity PF.

principles.name: Thermal resistance in LEDs
principles.explanation: Junction temperature sets lumen depreciation — heatsinking is optical engineering.

components.name: Lamp or module
components.madeFrom: Tungsten, mercury vapour tube, or LED COB

components.name: Luminaire housing
components.madeFrom: Stamped steel, aluminium die cast, polymer optics

components.name: Ballast or LED driver
components.function: Limits current; may provide dimming interface

components.name: Branch wiring and protection
components.madeFrom: Copper THHN, breakers, RCDs where required

rawMaterials.name: Tungsten wire
earthLocations: Wolframite mines in China, Portugal, Rwanda
rawMaterials.spaceAlternatives: LEDs preferred off-world where waste heat is costly
rawMaterials.processingRequired: Doping and drawing to controlled cold resistance

rawMaterials.name: Phosphors and rare earths
earthLocations: Bayan Obo rare earths historically dominant

buildSteps.title: Design photometric layout
buildSteps.description: Target illuminance per task; choose spacing criterion; model glare angles.
prerequisiteTools: photometric software or lumen method tables

buildSteps.title: Size feeders for voltage drop
buildSteps.description: Keep drop within code; account for inrush on HID; segregate dimmed noise-sensitive circuits.

buildSteps.title: Install protection and earthing
buildSteps.description: RCDs for wet zones; equipotential bonding; surge protection on LED outdoor strings.
buildSteps.warningNote: Shared neutrals with smart switches can energise shells

buildSteps.title: Commission drivers
buildSteps.description: Set DIP switches for current; verify flicker percent with meter; log temperatures at heat sinks.
buildSteps.warningNote: PWM incompatibilities with phone cameras reveal bad drivers

buildSteps.title: Maintain lumen depreciation records
buildSteps.description: Group relamp schedules; clean optics; track dirt depreciation on street optics.
buildSteps.warningNote: LED catastrophic failures cluster if batch is bad — keep spare modules

history.event: Edison demonstrates practical incandescent lamp with carbonised filament and parallel distribution vision.
Mercury vapour street lighting spreads in Europe and America.
First practical visible-spectrum LED (red) demonstrated at GE.

inventors.name: Thomas Edison
inventors.contribution: Incandescent lamp commercialisation and electrical utility model

impact:
Electric light extended civil time into night — reshaping labour shifts, crime patterns, and education. It also became a load that justified baseload generators.

Solid-state lighting finally bent the lumen-per-watt curve enough to matter for climate-forced grids.

videos.title: LED and phosphor white
videos.description: Accredited solid-state lighting short courses on efficacy and thermal design.
